title: Has been greatest honour to serve as judge: Kerala High Court Justice MB Snehalatha bids farewell
description: The Kerala High Court on Friday held a full court reference in honour of Justice MB Snehalatha, who is slated to retire from service on May 31, 2026, upon attaining the age of superannuation.In her farewell address, Justice Snehalatha reflected on her judicial journey and described serving as a judge as the greatest honour of her life.She said that for a judge, every day on the Bench involved decisions affecting the lives, liberties, rights, and aspirations of people and that holding a judicial
